## Frame 29 (84.0s)

### Detailed Description
- The scene is a dimly lit interior hallway or common area, captured by a fisheye lens that distorts the perspective.
- On the right side, there are two gray metal doors, both marked with the number "46" in white.
- A black metal utility cart with two shelves is positioned in the center of the hallway, holding a green box on the top shelf and some brownish items on the bottom shelf.
- To the left, a wooden railing with vertical white balusters separates the hallway from a lower area, possibly a kitchen or laundry room.
- In the lower-left area behind the railing, a blue mop bucket and a white mop are visible.
